transcript: Speaker A: Could I get a sparkling water and do you have any snacks that aren't peanuts? Speaker B: Of course, pretzels okay? Speaker A: Perfect, thanks. Speaker C: This guy talks so easy. Me? I practice 'chicken or pasta' for ten minutes in my head. I need to fix this. My friend told me about this app Loora. You just talk to it. I'm trying it now. Speaker C: Sorry, my English is not good. Speaker D: You should practice everyday. Speaker C: But I don't have anyone to practice with. Speaker D: That's exactly what I'm here for. I'm Loora, your AI English tutor. Speaker C: I can speak with you? Speaker D: Yes, I'll chat with you, give you instant feedback on your pronunciation, and help you get better with every conversation. Speaker C: But I make a lot of mistakes. Speaker D: You don't have to worry about making mistakes because I'll guide you through them. Speaker C: Sounds good! Speaker D: Let's practice together every day and you'll see how quickly your English improves.

summary: A woman struggles with speaking English confidently on a flight and decides to try Loora, an AI English tutoring app. The app's AI avatar engages her in a supportive conversation, offering real-time feedback to help her practice without judgment.
